user_prompt: Find any anomalies in this data and write a summary report

ground_truth_anomalies.organic: Inconsistent month labels (abbreviations vs full names)

key_facts_produced: exec_summary: Full-year revenue 8,330,077 across 33,157 units. H2 down 45.6% vs H1.

facts_produced_in_excel_step2: anomalies_detected: [North/Product_B November z=2.26, North/Product_C 12 z=2.26, South/Product_B Mar z=-2.85, South/Product_E August z=-2.81]

word_output_actual_text.executive_summary: Full-year revenue 8,330,077 across 33,157 units. H2 down 45.6% vs H1. Best month: Novemberember (749,317). Worst month: March (638,957). 4 anomalies detected requiring investigation.
word_output_actual_text.anomaly_section: 4 statistical outliers detected at |z|>=2 threshold. Anomaly details: North/Product_B in November: revenue 51,790 (z-score 2.26); North/Product_C in 12: revenue 45,366 (z-score 2.26); South/Product_B in March: revenue 22,216 (z-score -2.85); South/Product_E in August: revenue 20,000 (z-score -2.81).
recommendations: Investigate North/Product_B November anomaly — revenue dropped to 51,790 (z=2.26).
